headline: Episode 13
summary: Headlines include coronavirus pandemic, UK politics & policy, German politics and UK energy
body_text:
This edition features these stories from ft.com

Southern African countries put on UK travel red list over Covid variant

British armoured division returns to Germany amid Ukraine tensions

China and Russia in spotlight as Greens take charge of German foreign policy

Taxpayer left exposed to gas price swings after £1.7bn Bulb rescue
